subject: docs(audit): monitoring entries, verification checklist, history rollup
body:
Audit finding #13 — add a file-size monitoring backlog entry for
`useTimelineCharts.js` (416 lines, 84 headroom) and `AppContext.jsx`
(338 lines after the split) so a future session gets a hint before
either file drifts over the 500-line soft-limit again.

Also rolls up the full second-pass documentation so the two audit
passes are discoverable from SESSION_NOTES / HISTORY / TODO without
having to read 8 commit messages individually:

- `docs/TODO.md`:
  * Post-sweep-verification item #4 added — covers the second-pass
    browser checks: chartHeight utility rounding (2px deltas on
    Timing/Tags), body bg/color removal across all 8 themes, the
    AppContext / appReducer split (filters still apply, cross-tab
    sync, theme toggle), and the Timeline handleCardClick
    micro-optimization.
  * New "File-size monitoring" section with two forward-looking
    entries for useTimelineCharts.js and AppContext.jsx. Each entry
    gives concrete split guidance so a future session doesn't have
    to re-discover the extraction boundary.
  * Footer rewritten to describe both audit passes (13 + 8 commits,
    18 + 20 findings) and the final file-size posture (every section
    + shared component + state file under 500 lines).

- `docs/SESSION_NOTES.md`:
  * Second-pass commit list expanded from 2 entries + "see git log"
    to all 8 commits with one-line summaries, so a future session
    can trace the branch history entirely from this file.
  * New "Current file-size posture" subsection listing the largest
    files in each category — quickly answers "is this file at risk
    of violating the soft-limit?" for a future reviewer.

- `docs/HISTORY.md`:
  * New "Second audit-cleanup pass" entry at the top of the
    2026-04-15 section, with paragraph-per-commit summaries
    covering all 8 second-pass commits. The existing first-pass
    entries remain unchanged below the new entry.

Verified final file-size posture:
  dashboard/js/AppContext.jsx                338 lines
  dashboard/js/appReducer.js                 285 lines (new)
  dashboard/js/hooks/useTimelineCharts.js    416 lines (monitored)
  dashboard/styles.css                       177 lines

Every section component (`sections/*.jsx`) and every shared
component (`components/*.jsx`) is under the 500-line soft-limit.
The only files over 300 lines are AppContext (338), App (490),
Progress (479), Timing (437), Discover (430), useTimelineCharts
(416), Timeline (390), Health (378), Summary (366), FilterSidebar
(326), Contributors (307) — none over 500.

Build clean, 60/60 tests pass.

Tags: documentation, audit, todo
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: post-audit-cleanup
Semver: patch
